summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iPhone e-commerce store. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with one critical bug in Admin dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: DollarSign icon component not properly imported - causing runtime error and preventing admin page from loading
ui_bugs.error_details: ReferenceError: DollarSign is not defined. Should use CurrencyDollar instead of DollarSign in Admin.js

passed_tests: JWT token authentication for protected routes
Product listing page shows all iPhones (4 products)
Product detail modal with variant selection (5 variants)
Shopping cart page with quantity update (5 items)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Admin dashboard bug: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Admin.js line 93, change <DollarSign> to <CurrencyDollar> to match the import statement. This is preventing the admin dashboard from loading.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 major features working, admin dashboard blocked by import error)
